title: Uhambo Lwamagugu Ezifundazweni ZaseNingizimu Afrika
subject: History
caps_topic: A heritage trail through the provinces of South Africa

sources.title: A glossary: Culture, heritage and identity
Celebrating cultural heritage in modern South Africa
Sterkfontein Caves, Krugersdorp (within the Cradle of Humankind World Heritage Site)
First celebration of National Heritage Day

slides.title: Uhambo Lwamagugu Ezifundazweni ZaseNingizimu Afrika
slides.lead: Asihambe kuzo zonke izifundazwe eziyisishiyagalolunye sithole izindawo ezikhethekile, izindaba namasiko angawethu sonke.

media.alt: Imephu enemibala ebonisa uhlaka lweNingizimu Afrika enamachashazi amakha izindawo zamagugu ezweni lonke.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 320 200' role='img'><rect width='320' height='200' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M60 60 L150 46 L210 54 L262 78 L268 118 L232 152 L196 168 L150 160 L120 172 L92 150 L70 118 L54 92 Z' fill='#7a8b5a' stroke='#4d5c37' stroke-width='2'/><circle cx='190' cy='84' r='6' fill='#8a1f1f'/><circle cx='210' cy='70' r='6' fill='#e8a13a'/><circle cx='120' cy='150' r='6' fill='#2f5233'/><circle cx='215' cy='140' r='6' fill='#8a1f1f'/><circle cx='150' cy='110' r='6' fill='#e8a13a'/><path d='M120 150 Q160 90 210 70' fill='none' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='2' stroke-dasharray='5 5'/></svg>

slides.notes: Amukela abafundi uchaze umqondo 'wohambo lwamagugu' - uhambo olucatshangelwayo olumela ezindaweni ezikhethekile kulo lonke elaseNingizimu Afrika. Buza: ukhona yini oke wavakashela imnyuziyamu, isakhiwo esidala, isikhumbuzo noma indawo yemvelo? Uhambo lwamagugu luxhumanisa lezi zindawo ndawonye. Ekupheleni kwesifundo abafundi kufanele bakwazi ukubala izindawo zamagugu ezifundazweni ezihlukene bathi kungani sizivikela.

slides.title: Ayini amagugu?
slides.lead: Amagugu yikho konke esikuthola kwabaphila esikhathini esidlule esifuna ukukugcinela ikusasa.

blocks.text: **Amagugu** yizinto esizithola kubantu ababephila ngaphambi kwethu. Kungaba yizinto esingazithinta, njengezakhiwo ezindala namathuluzi, nezinto esingeke sizithinte, njengezingoma, izindaba, izilimi namaresiphi okupheka. Amagugu asisiza ukwazi ukuthi singobani nokuthi sivelaphi.

items: **Amagugu emvelo** - izintaba ezikhethekile, imihume, imifula nezilwane.
**Amagugu amasiko** - izakhiwo, izikhumbuzo, ubuciko nezinto ezindala.
**Amagugu aphilayo** - izilimi, umculo, imidanso, ukudla nemigubho.

media.alt: Izimpawu ezintathu ezilula: intaba, isakhiwo esidala nesigubhu, ezibonisa izinhlobo ezintathu zamagugu.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 300 140' role='img'><rect width='300' height='140' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M20 110 L55 50 L90 110 Z' fill='#7a8b5a'/><path d='M55 50 L70 74 L60 82 Z' fill='#fff'/><rect x='120' y='60' width='60' height='50' fill='#c8b89a'/><path d='M116 60 L150 34 L184 60 Z' fill='#8a1f1f'/><rect x='142' y='80' width='16' height='30' fill='#7a5a3a'/><ellipse cx='250' cy='66' rx='24' ry='10' fill='#e8a13a'/><path d='M226 66 v34 a24 10 0 0 0 48 0 v-34' fill='#c8871f'/></svg>

slides.notes: Nikeza izibonelo eziqondile zohlobo ngalunye ukuze abafundi bebanga 5 bakwazi ukuzicabanga: emvelo (iTable Mountain), amasiko (iUnion Buildings), aphilayo (ukucula isicathamiya, ukosa inyama nomndeni, ukuxoxa izinganekwane). Gcizelela ukuthi amagugu aphilayo ahlala kubantu, hhayi esakhiweni. Cela abafundi babale igugu elilodwa lomndeni wabo.

slides.title: Izindawo Zamagugu Omhlaba zaseNingizimu Afrika
slides.lead: Ezinye zezindawo zethu zikhetheke kangangokuthi umhlaba wonke usiza ukuzinakekela.

blocks.text: **Indawo Yamagugu Omhlaba** yindawo ekhethwe yinhlangano ebizwa ngokuthi i-**UNESCO** ngoba ibalulekile kubo bonke abantu emhlabeni, hhayi ezweni elilodwa kuphela. INingizimu Afrika inezindawo ezingaba **yishumi** ezinjalo, ezisabalele ezifundazweni. Ohambeni lwethu sizovakashela ezinye zazo.

items: Ezinye zikhethelwa imvelo, njengezintaba zaseKapa noKhahlamba (iDrakensberg).
Ezinye zikhethelwa umlando, njengeMapungubwe neRobben Island.
Ukuba sohlwini kusho ukuthi indawo ivikelelwe izingane zesikhathi esizayo.

media.alt: Ibheji eyindilinga enombhalo womhlaba ngaphakathi, njengophawu Lwamagugu Omhlaba.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 200 140' role='img'><rect width='200' height='140' fill='#f4efe6'/><circle cx='100' cy='70' r='46' fill='none' stroke='#2f5233' stroke-width='5'/><circle cx='100' cy='70' r='26' fill='#a8bcae'/><path d='M74 70 h52 M100 44 v52 M82 54 q18 16 36 0 M82 86 q18 -16 36 0' fill='none' stroke='#2f5233' stroke-width='2'/><rect x='60' y='118' width='80' height='6' fill='#e8a13a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Gcina incazelo ilula: i-UNESCO iyiqembu elikwa-United Nations elenza uhlu olukhethekile lwezindawo ezibaluleke kakhulu emhlabeni. Awudingi ukuthi abafundi bagcine inombolo eqondile ngekhanda - iphuzu ukuthi iNingizimu Afrika icebile ngezindawo ezinjalo. [SME] Sicela uqinisekise inani lamanje lezindawo Zamagugu Omhlaba ze-UNESCO zaseNingizimu Afrika (bekuyishumi ngonyaka ka-2023) ngaphambi kokuba isifundo siqale ukusetshenziswa.

slides.title: Isitobhi samagugu esisodwa esifundazweni ngasinye
slides.lead: Izifundazwe eziyisishiyagalolunye, izindawo eziyisishiyagalolunye ezidumile esizozivakashela ohambeni lwethu.

blocks.heading: Gauteng
blocks.text: iCradle of Humankind - imihume enamathambo amadala kakhulu abantu (amafosili).

blocks.heading: Limpopo
blocks.text: iMapungubwe - umbuso wokuqala waseNingizimu Afrika nobhejane wegolide.

blocks.heading: Western Cape
blocks.text: iRobben Island - ijele lapho uNelson Mandela ayeboshelwe khona.

blocks.heading: KwaZulu-Natal
blocks.text: Izintaba zoKhahlamba (iDrakensberg) - izinkulungwane zemidwebo yamatshe yamaSan.

blocks.heading: Eastern Cape
blocks.text: iQunu neMthatha - izindawo zobuntwana bukaNelson Mandela.

blocks.heading: Northern Cape
blocks.text: Amagugu amaSan nemiqopho yamatshe yasendulo eKaroo eyomile.

blocks.heading: Free State
blocks.text: Imizi yabeSotho neVredefort Dome eseduze.

blocks.heading: North West
blocks.text: iTaung, lapho kwatholakala khona ugebhezi lwekhanda lengane yasendulo.

blocks.heading: Mpumalanga
blocks.text: Izintaba zaseMakhonjwa eBarberton - amanye amatshe amadala kunawo wonke emhlabeni.

slides.notes: Lesi yisilaydi esibukezayo. Funda isifundazwe ngasinye nesitobhi saso ngokuzwakalayo, ukhombe cishe lapho sikhona emephini ecatshangelwayo (noma emephini yodonga uma unayo). Tshela abafundi ukuthi amaslayidi alandelayo azogxila kwezimbalwa zalezi. Ungacela umfundi ngamunye akhethe isitobhi afisa kakhulu ukusivakashela asho ukuthi kungani. [SME] Qinisekisa ukuthi ukuhlanganiswa kwezifundazwe nezindawo kufanele ikilasi lakho; isifundazwe ngasinye sinezindawo zamagugu eziningi futhi othisha bangakhetha izibonelo zendawo.

slides.title: iCradle of Humankind
slides.lead: Iqoqo lemihume eduze neGoli (Johannesburg) lapho ososayensi bathola khona amanye amathambo amadala kunawo wonke omndeni wabantu emhlabeni (amafosili).

blocks.text: E-**Sterkfontein Caves** ososayensi bembe **amafosili** - amathambo aphenduka aba yitshe - abantu bokuqala ababephila eminyakeni eyizigidi edlule. Okutholakele okudumile kufaka ugebhezi olwaziwa ngokuthi 'uMrs Ples' nethambo eliphelele cishe elibizwa ngokuthi 'uLittle Foot'. Yingakho le ndawo ibizwa ngokuthi *iCradle of Humankind*.

items: Umbhede wosana yilapho ingane elala khona - ngakho lokhu kufana nendawo yokuzalwa kwabantu.
Iyindawo Yamagugu Omhlaba ngoba ixoxa indaba yabo bonke abantu.
Usengavakashela imihume nemnyuziyamu namuhla.

media.alt: Umfanekiso obonisa ngaphakathi komhume ongaphansi komhlaba, onogebhezi lwefosili ngaphakathi.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 150' role='img'><rect width='240' height='150' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect y='30' width='240' height='120' fill='#7a5a3a'/><path d='M50 70 q70 -30 140 0 q20 30 -10 44 q-60 24 -120 0 q-30 -14 -10 -44 Z' fill='#3a2c1c'/><circle cx='120' cy='96' r='14' fill='#e6ddc8'/><circle cx='115' cy='94' r='3' fill='#3a2c1c'/><circle cx='125' cy='94' r='3' fill='#3a2c1c'/><rect x='114' y='104' width='12' height='6' fill='#c8b89a'/><rect y='24' width='240' height='8' fill='#7a8b5a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Chaza kahle 'ifosili': amathambo aphenduka kancane aba yitshe ngesikhathi eside kakhulu. ULittle Foot noMrs Ples benza isayensi ibonakale iyiqiniso kubafundi. Gcina umqondo wesikhathi esidala uthambile - 'kudala kakhulu, kudala kunalokho esingakucabanga.' Xhumanisa nekhadi lesilaydi 5. [SME] Izinsuku zenziwe lula ngamabomu; qinisekisa noma yiziphi izinombolo uthisha akhetha ukuzengeza ngokuzwakalayo.

slides.title: Umbuso waseMapungubwe
slides.lead: Kudala, phezu kwegquma elinesiqongo esiyisicaba enyakatho kude, kwakumi inhloko-dolobha yombuso wokuqala waseNingizimu Afrika.

blocks.text: Cishe eminyakeni engu-700 kuya ku-800 edlule, i-**Mapungubwe** yayingumbuso omatasa lapho abantu babelima, befuya izinkomo, behwebelana ngegolide nangophondo lwendlovu namazwe akude. Inkosi yayihlala phezu kwegquma elikhethekile. Kamuva izazi zezinto zasendulo (o-archaeologist) zathola khona izinto zegolide ezinhle, kufaka **ubhejane omncane wegolide**.

items: Kubonisa ukuthi imibuso emikhulu yase-Afrika yayikhona lapha kudala ngaphambi kokufika kwabelungu baseYurophu.
Ubhejane wegolide manje uwuphawu oludumile lomlando waseNingizimu Afrika.
IMapungubwe iyiNdawo Yamagugu Omhlaba emngceleni neZimbabwe neBotswana.

media.alt: Igquma elinesiqongo esiyisicaba elinesimo sobhejane omncane wegolide phambi kwalo.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 150' role='img'><rect width='240' height='150' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect y='110' width='240' height='40' fill='#c8b89a'/><path d='M60 110 L60 60 Q60 52 70 52 L170 52 Q180 52 180 60 L180 110 Z' fill='#a8794a'/><ellipse cx='120' cy='52' rx='60' ry='8' fill='#c08a52'/><circle cx='210' cy='40' r='18' fill='#e8a13a'/><g fill='#d4a017'><ellipse cx='120' cy='128' rx='26' ry='10'/><rect x='100' y='120' width='6' height='14'/><rect x='134' y='120' width='6' height='14'/><path d='M146 124 l10 -4 l-2 6 Z'/></g></svg>

slides.notes: Lesi silaydi silungisa inganekwane evamile ngokubonisa umbuso wase-Afrika onamandla nocebile owachuma kudala ngaphambi kwezikhathi zobukoloni. Gcizelela uhwebo (igolide nophondo lwendlovu okwakuhamba kude ngolwandle) nobhejane wegolide njengegugu. Abafundi bebanga 6 bazofunda ngeMapungubwe ngokujulile kamuva, ngakho utshala imbewu. Gcina izinsuku zizungezisiwe ('cishe eminyakeni engu-700 kuya ku-800 edlule').

slides.title: iRobben Island
slides.lead: Isiqhingi esincane olwandle eduze neKapa (Cape Town) esaba yijele elidumile - kanye nophawu lwenkululeko.

blocks.text: Iminyaka eminingi i-**Robben Island** yayiyijele. Ngesikhathi sobandlululo, abaholi ababelwela amalungelo alinganayo babevalelwe lapha, kude nemindeni yabo. **UNelson Mandela** wachitha iminyaka eminingi esitokisini esincane kulesi siqhingi ngaphambi kokuba akhululwe, kamuva waba ngumongameli wokuqala waseNingizimu Afrika okhethwe ngentando yeningi.

items: Namuhla iyimnyuziyamu efundisa izivakashi ngomzabalazo wenkululeko.
Abanye abaqondisi bayiziboshwa zangaphambili ezabelana ngezindaba zazo.
Isikhumbuza ukuthi siyazise inkululeko namalungelo esinawo namuhla.

media.alt: Isiqhingi esincane esinesibani solwandle (i-lighthouse), neTable Mountain kude.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 150' role='img'><rect width='240' height='150' fill='#cfe3ec'/><rect y='96' width='240' height='54' fill='#5f86a3'/><path d='M150 70 L215 70 L215 96 L150 96 Z' fill='#8a9b78'/><path d='M150 70 L160 70 L160 96 L150 96 Z' fill='#7a8b5a'/><ellipse cx='70' cy='100' rx='58' ry='12' fill='#c8b89a'/><rect x='60' y='72' width='12' height='30' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M60 72 L78 72 L72 60 L66 60 Z' fill='#8a1f1f'/><rect x='63' y='60' width='6' height='6' fill='#e8a13a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Phatha udaba lobandlululo ngokucophelela nangobulula ebangeni 5: abanye abantu babephathwa ngokungenabulungiswa ngenxa yombala wesikhumba sabo, kanti abantu abanesibindi basebenzela ukukushintsha lokho. Beka iRobben Island njengendawo yosizi kanye nethemba. Xhumanisa noSuku Lwenkululeko / uNelson Mandela uma abafundi bemazi. Gwema imininingwane eshaqisayo; gxila esibindini nasekubalulekeni kwenkululeko.

slides.title: Ubuciko Bamatshe boKhahlamba (iDrakensberg)
slides.lead: Phezulu ezintabeni zoKhahlamba (iDrakensberg) kunezinkulungwane zemidwebo eyenziwa ngabantu bamaSan kudala.

blocks.text: **UKhahlamba-Drakensberg** uwuhla lwezintaba oluphakeme kunazo zonke eNingizimu Afrika. Imihume nezikhoselo zamatshe zawo ziqukethe izinkulungwane **zemidwebo yamatshe** eyenziwe **ngamaSan** ayengabazingeli abaqoqi bokudla. Adweba abantu, izimpofu, nezinkolelo zawo esebenzisa upende wemvelo ovela ematsheni, ezitshalweni nasezilwaneni.

items: Igama elithi uKhahlamba lisho 'uthango lwemikhonto' ngesiZulu.
Imidwebo ineminyaka engamakhulu ngisho neyizinkulungwane.
Iyindawo Yamagugu Omhlaba ngenxa yemvelo yayo kanye nobuciko bayo basendulo.

media.alt: Udonga lomhume olunemidwebo yamatshe yamaSan yempofu nesithombe somuntu ogijimayo.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 150' role='img'><rect width='240' height='150' fill='#e6dcc4'/><path d='M0 0 L240 0 L240 24 Q120 40 0 24 Z' fill='#b7a98d'/><g fill='#8a4b2a'><ellipse cx='150' cy='84' rx='34' ry='20'/><rect x='124' y='96' width='6' height='24'/><rect x='140' y='98' width='6' height='24'/><rect x='158' y='98' width='6' height='24'/><rect x='176' y='96' width='6' height='24'/><path d='M184 70 l16 -14 l2 6 Z'/><path d='M188 74 l16 -10 l0 6 Z'/></g><g fill='#7a2f1a'><circle cx='60' cy='70' r='7'/><rect x='57' y='77' width='6' height='22'/><path d='M60 82 l-14 8 M60 82 l14 6 M60 99 l-10 18 M60 99 l12 16' stroke='#7a2f1a' stroke-width='3' fill='none'/></g></svg>

slides.notes: Ethula amaSan njengabantu bokuqala baseNingizimu Afrika kanye nabaciko nabaxoxi bezindaba abanekhono. Chaza ukuthi upende wawenziwa kanjani ngezinto zemvelo (i-ochre, amalahle, amanzi ezitshalo, amafutha ezilwane). Impofu yayiyisilwane esibaluleke kakhulu ezinkolelweni zamaSan. Phatha amagugu amaSan ngenhlonipho - le miqopho ingcwele emiphakathini yenzalo yabo. Xhumanisa nemiqopho yamatshe yaseNyakatho Kapa esilaydini esilandelayo.

slides.title: Nqamula iKaroo neFree State
slides.lead: Ezinye izitobhi ezintathu ohambeni lwethu - eMpumalanga Kapa (Eastern Cape), eNyakatho Kapa (Northern Cape) naseFree State.

blocks.heading: Eastern Cape - Qunu
blocks.text: Amagquma aluhlaza lapho uNelson Mandela akhulela khona. Imnyuziyamu eMthatha ixoxa indaba yempilo yakhe.

blocks.heading: Northern Cape - Wildebeest Kuil
blocks.text: Igquma eligcwele imiqopho yamatshe yasendulo, elinakekelwa yimiphakathi yamaSan neyamaKhoe.

blocks.heading: Free State - Basotho Village
blocks.text: Imnyuziyamu ephilayo lapho ungabona khona izindlu zesintu zabeSotho ezinezindonga ezinhle ezipendiwe.

media.alt: Izigcawu ezintathu ezincane: amagquma agobayo, itshe eliqoshiwe, neqhugwane eliyindilinga elipendiwe.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 300 130' role='img'><rect width='300' height='130' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M10 90 q25 -30 50 0 q25 30 50 0 L110 110 L10 110 Z' fill='#7a8b5a'/><path d='M120 60 l50 8 l-6 44 l-46 -6 Z' fill='#a8794a'/><g stroke='#5a3a1a' stroke-width='2' fill='none'><circle cx='140' cy='84' r='8'/><path d='M150 78 l10 4 M132 92 l-6 8'/></g><path d='M212 108 a30 30 0 0 1 60 0 Z' fill='#c8b89a'/><path d='M206 82 l36 -22 l36 22 Z' fill='#8a5a2a'/><rect x='236' y='90' width='12' height='18' fill='#7a5a3a'/><g stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='2'><path d='M214 100 h46 M218 106 h38'/></g></svg>

slides.notes: Lezi zitobhi ezintathu zandisa uhambo zize ezifundazweni eziningi nasezinhlotsheni eziningi zamagugu: indawo yokuzalwa komuntu (iMpumalanga Kapa), ubuciko basendulo (imiqopho yaseNyakatho Kapa, eqoshwe etsheni esikhundleni sokudwetshwa phezu kwalo), namagugu aphilayo emzini osebenzayo (iFree State). Veza umehluko phakathi kwemidwebo yamatshe (iKwaZulu-Natal) nemiqopho yamatshe (iNyakatho Kapa). [SME] Faka izindawo zendawo zaseMpumalanga Kapa noma iFree State uma zifanele abafundi bakho kangcono.

slides.title: Amatshe asendulo nengane yasendulo
slides.lead: Izitobhi zethu ezimbili zokugcina zezifundazwe ziya eNyakatho Ntshonalanga (North West) naseMpumalanga.

blocks.heading: North West - Taung
blocks.text: Ngo-1924 ugebhezi lwefosili lwengane yasendulo, 'iTaung Child', lwatholakala lapha. Lwasiza umhlaba ukuthola ukuthi abantu baqala e-Afrika.

blocks.heading: Mpumalanga - Barberton
blocks.text: Izintaba zaseMakhonjwa ziqukethe amanye amatshe amadala kunawo wonke emhlabeni - cishe eminyakeni eyizigidi ezingu-3 500 - manje seyiyiNdawo Yamagugu Omhlaba.

blocks.heading: Bonus - Gauteng
blocks.text: iFreedom Park neConstitution Hill enyakatho zikhumbula umzabalazo wamalungelo abantu nentando yeningi.

media.alt: Ugebhezi lwefosili oluncane eceleni kwezintaba zasendulo ezinezendlalo.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 130' role='img'><rect width='240' height='130' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M120 30 L180 110 L60 110 Z' fill='#6b7a8c'/><path d='M170 55 L210 110 L130 110 Z' fill='#8091a3'/><path d='M60 70 L95 110 L25 110 Z' fill='#5a6878'/><g><circle cx='95' cy='84' r='16' fill='#e6ddc8'/><circle cx='89' cy='82' r='3' fill='#3a2c1c'/><circle cx='100' cy='82' r='3' fill='#3a2c1c'/><path d='M90 92 q5 5 10 0' fill='none' stroke='#3a2c1c' stroke-width='2'/></g></svg>

slides.notes: ITaung ixhumana nesihloko se-Cradle of Humankind - iNingizimu Afrika isemqoka endabeni yemvelaphi yabantu. IBarberton ibonisa amagugu emvelo ohlobo oluhlukile: amatshe amadala ngendlela emangalisayo. Ikhadi lebhonasi likuvumela ukuthi usho izindawo zentando yeningi zaseGauteng (iFreedom Park, iConstitution Hill). [SME] Qinisekisa unyaka wokutholakala kweTaung Child (1924) neminyaka yamatshe ezungezisiwe (cishe izigidi ezingu-3 500 zeminyaka) uma uzicaphuna ngokuzwakalayo.

slides.title: Amagugu aphilayo noSuku Lwamagugu
slides.lead: Awawona wonke amagugu ahlala athule emnyuziyamu - amanye aphila kulokho esikwenzayo nsuku zonke.

blocks.text: **Amagugu aphilayo** adluliselwa kusukela kogogo nomkhulu kuya kubazali kuya ezinganeni. Afaka **izilimi zethu ezisemthethweni ezingu-11**, izingoma nemidanso yethu, izindaba zethu, izingubo zethu nokudla esikuthandayo. Minyaka yonke **ngomhla ka-24 Septhemba** iNingizimu Afrika igubha **uSuku Lwamagugu**, lapho sihlonipha wonke amasiko ethu ahlukene.

items: Umculo nomdanso onjengesicathamiya, umgqashiyo wamagumboot (gumboot) ne-amapiano.
Ukudla okunjengephalishi (ipapa), i-bunny chow, ama-koeksister, umngqusho ne-chakalaka.
Izindaba, izibongo nemidlalo eyabelwana ngayo imindeni.

media.alt: Amanothi omculo, isigubhu nepuleti lokudla okumele amagugu aphilayo.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 260 130' role='img'><rect width='260' height='130' fill='#f4efe6'/><ellipse cx='60' cy='70' rx='30' ry='14' fill='#e8a13a'/><path d='M30 70 v26 a30 14 0 0 0 60 0 v-26' fill='#c8871f'/><g fill='#2f5233'><circle cx='140' cy='90' r='8'/><rect x='146' y='52' width='4' height='40'/><circle cx='176' cy='82' r='8'/><rect x='182' y='46' width='4' height='38'/><path d='M148 52 h36 v8 h-36 Z'/></g><circle cx='222' cy='84' r='24' fill='#fff' stroke='#c8b89a' stroke-width='3'/><path d='M210 84 q12 -14 24 0' fill='#8a1f1f'/><circle cx='216' cy='80' r='4' fill='#7a8b5a'/><circle cx='230' cy='86' r='4' fill='#e8a13a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Yenza lesi silaydi sibe yileso esibandakanya kakhulu abafundi. Cela abafundi babelane ngengoma, ukudla noma indaba yasekhaya kubo. Gcizelela ukuthi amagugu aphilayo angawawo wonke umuntu futhi ayaqhubeka eshintsha - i-amapiano iyigugu elisha elenziwa khona manje. Chaza uSuku Lwamagugu ngobulula: iholidi lomphakathi lokugubha wonke amasiko ethu ndawonye. Qinisa inhlonipho ngokwehluka.

slides.title: Ukunakekela amagugu ethu
slides.lead: Amagugu angawethu sonke, ngakho sonke kufanele sisize ukuwavikela.

blocks.text: Uma izakhiwo ezindala ziwa, imidwebo yamatshe iklwejwa, noma izindaba zingaphinde zixoxwe, lawo magugu alahleka unomphela. Yingakho sinemi-**nyuziyamu**, izi-**khumbuzo** nemithetho evikela izindawo ezikhethekile. Kodwa nabantu abavamile bayasiza - ngokuvakasha, ngokufunda nangokudlulisela lokho abakwaziyo.

items: Ungalokothi uthinte noma ulimaze ubuciko bamatshe noma izinto ezindala.
Vakashela imnyuziyamu nezindawo zamagugu ukuze ufunde izindaba zazo.
Lalela abadala udlulisele izindaba zabo kwabanye.

media.alt: Izandla ezimbili ezibambe kahle isakhiwo esincane nesihlahla, zibonisa ukunakekela amagugu.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 140' role='img'><rect width='240' height='140' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M40 120 q-8 -34 20 -40 l0 20 q30 -6 44 0 l0 -20 q28 6 20 40 Z' fill='#e0b98a'/><rect x='96' y='52' width='34' height='34' fill='#c8b89a'/><path d='M92 52 L113 34 L134 52 Z' fill='#8a1f1f'/><rect x='108' y='66' width='10' height='20' fill='#7a5a3a'/><circle cx='160' cy='58' r='20' fill='#7a8b5a'/><rect x='156' y='58' width='8' height='30' fill='#7a5a3a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Letha isifundo 'kusho ukuthini' - amagugu abuthakathaka futhi angalahleka. Xhumanisa amathiphu amathathu nokuziphatha kwangempela ohambweni lwesikole. Qinisa inhlonipho ngezindawo ezingcwele njengobuciko bamatshe bamaSan. Ungacela abafundi babale into eyodwa abazoyenza ukuvikela amagugu. Lokhu kulungiselela imibuzo yokubukeza.

slides.title: Esikufundile ohambeni
slides.lead: Sihambe kuzo zonke izifundazwe eziyisishiyagalolunye sahlangana namagugu emvelo, awamasiko naphilayo.

blocks.text: Kusukela emihumeni ye-**Cradle of Humankind** kuya embusweni **waseMapungubwe**, ijele **laseRobben Island** nezintaba ezinemidwebo **zoKhahlamba (iDrakensberg)**, amagugu aseNingizimu Afrika axoxa indaba yabo bonke abantu bayo. Amagugu angawawo wonke umuntu, futhi wonke umuntu angasiza ukuwavikela.

blocks.question: Bala izindawo zamagugu ezintathu ezihlukene bese usho ukuthi ngasinye sikusiphi isifundazwe.
Chaza umehluko phakathi kwamagugu emvelo, amagugu amasiko namagugu aphilayo. Nikeza isibonelo esisodwa salunye ngalunye.
Kungani kubalulekile ukunakekela amagugu ethu? Nikeza izizathu ezimbili.

slides.notes: Sebenzisa imibuzo emithathu njengomsebenzi obhaliwe noma ingxoxo yekilasi. Umbuzo 1 uhlola ukukhumbula izindawo nezifundazwe; umbuzo 2 uhlola umqondo omqoka wezinhlobo ezintathu zamagugu; umbuzo 3 uhlola ukuqonda ukuthi kungani amagugu ebalulekile. Ukwabiwa kwamamaki kulandela isitayela se-CAPS Isigaba Esiphakathi. Vala ngokukhumbuza abafundi ukuthi nabo bayingxenye yamagugu aphilayo aseNingizimu Afrika.
